recommendations.title: El señor doctor
recommendations.overview: It's about a country doctor that comes to the city while a clinic is built in his home town... he rubs off his care and compassion on others at the hospital with his humor and wit.

recommendations.title: Up and Down
recommendations.overview: It is the story of a sportsman who is a little bit dumber than most people but nevertheless he succeeds in getting a job at a sports article saler's. Having this job is the beginning of a lot of funny problems he causes due to his dumbness.

recommendations.title: El patrullero 777
recommendations.overview: Follows Diogenes as he goes about his day as a police officer. He's prone to do things the right way, surrounded by a pretty much corrupt & citizen distant police department, & always resolves his duties with a personal method.

recommendations.title: El profe

recommendations.title: ¡A volar, joven!

recommendations.title: El analfabeto
recommendations.overview: Inocencio Prieto y Calvo receives a letter telling him he is the heir to his uncle's fortune of two million pesos. Not being able to read he has no idea of who sent the letter or its content.  So he goes to the drugstore because the pharmacist can re

recommendations.title: Boruto: Naruto the Movie
recommendations.overview: The spirited Boruto Uzumaki, son of Seventh Hokage Naruto, is a skilled ninja who possesses the same brashness and passion his father once had. However, the constant absence of his father, who is busy with his Hokage duties, puts a damper on Boruto's

recommendations.title: Corpus Christi
recommendations.overview: A pious 20-year-old juvenile delinquent is sent to work at a sawmill in a small town; on arrival, he dresses up as a priest and accidentally takes over the local parish. The arrival of this young, charismatic preacher is an opportunity for the local

recommendations.title: A Fish Called Wanda
recommendations.overview: While a diamond advocate attempts to steal a collection of diamonds, troubles arise when he realises he’s not the only one after the collection.

recommendations.title: The Little World of Don Camillo
